texto: A Christian goes to college to discover his vocation - and to develop skills necessary to occupy a section of cultural, intellectual domain in a manner worthy of the kingdom of God.A believer also goes to college to gain general information and habits of thought necessary for developing a well-structured soul suitable for a well-informed, good citizen of both earthly and heavenly kingdoms.
explicacao: Orientação direta de JP Morelands sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A Christian goes to college to discover his vocation - and to develop skills necessary to occupy …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, education, college, útil em momentos de reflexao.
